name: Stocker vrm 289 power
Stocker vrm 273 power
Stocker vrm 32 power
Formater + POST serveur BMS
Solar power → InfluxDB + daly-bms-server
info:
Sujets MQTT utilisés :

SmartSolar MPPT VE.Can 250/100 (instance 273)
N/c0619ab9929a/solarcharger/273/Yield/Power

SmartSolar Charger MPPT 150/35 (instance 289)
N/c0619ab9929a/solarcharger/289/Yield/Power

PV Inverter ET112 addr 0x07 (instance 32)
N/c0619ab9929a/pvinverter/32/Ac/L1/Power

ESS AC Output Consumption (Maison)
N/c0619ab9929a/system/0/Ac/ConsumptionOnOutput/L1/Power

---
POST /api/v1/solar/mppt-yield envoie :
  solar_total_w = 273+289+ET112 (source de vérité VRM)
  mppt_power_w  = 273+289 seulement (pour meteo.json Venus OS)
  house_power_w = ConsumptionOnOutput (valeur directe VRM, pas calculée)

global.mppt_power_w est aussi lu par meteo.json keepalive (push Venus OS).

name: Stocker house_power_w
